CONTENT.Club career: Mattia Pagliuca made his Serie A debut for Bologna on 13 December 2020 against Roma appearing as a substitute for Emanuel Vignato at the Stadio Renato Dall'Ara in a 5–1 defeat.In the summer of 2022 he went on loan to Imolese; in December 2022 he suffered a cruciate ligament break in his knee which forced him to end the competitive season early.On 21 August 2023 his transfer was announced, on annual loan, to Alessandria. On 1 February 2024, Pagliuca moved on loan to Brindisi.
CONTENT.Personal life: Mattia is the son of former Italian international goalkeeper Gianluca Pagliuca who also previously played for Bologna.

SUMMARY: Mattia Pagliuca (born 25 April 2002) is an Italian professional footballer who plays for Serie D club Brindisi on loan from Bologna.
